recentTweets.text:
OVAL OFFICE CASH GRAB: While Trump’s policies make life more expensive for Americans, he continues profitting off the presidency: Now he’s selling Wall Street faster access to his market-moving public statements on his dubious social media platform.
https://t.co/Pw73AK53Nm

Not all roads lead to Rome! Today, we recognize a special path that leads us to the heart & soul of some of Federal Hill’s finest food & traditions. Celebrating “Angelo's Way” - complimenti! https://t.co/x5qQB9uzhJ
Great visit with @WarwickPAL’s student athletes this morning, chatting about gov’t & civics and how leadership & teamwork will help carry them far. https://t.co/LWkuYcfVl1
https://t.co/cigeAFJzwE
Trump is making the U.S. weaker and raising prices. https://t.co/Kob1h5tIcX

America needs leaders who respect & uphold the Constitution. 

I’ve voted multiple times to end this unauthorized war. 

And I will not stop pressing Republicans to finally summon the courage to join Democrats in doing the right thing and holding Trump accountable.

America doesn’t need another ‘forever war’ & it doesn’t need Pres. Trump trying to promote his terrible deal as a ‘victory.’ 

Instead, we need true professional negotiators who understand how to bring about a meaningful end to Trump’s war.

Every day, Americans are paying higher costs due to Pres. Trump’s unilateral failures in Iran. I’ve been clear since day one: Trump must change course. 

Clearly, his son-in-law & golfing buddy aren’t getting the job done. Not in Iran. And not in Ukraine.

I opposed Pres. Trump’s reckless Iran war from the start.

It’s been one mistake after another resulting in lost lives, billions of dollars wasted, depleted munitions, & global instability. 

Meanwhile, Republicans refuse to hold this Admin accountable for its failures.

ICE is supposed to enforce immigration laws and promote public safety, not shoot people in the streets of Maine and Texas. 

It is unacceptable and there has to be independent investigations & real accountability.

Join me in fighting Trump’s attacks on science, education, & our communities!

Trump wants to end merit-based review of federal grants & instead give political appointees unprecedented power.

Submit a public comment on Trump’s hyper-partisan OMB proposal ASAP:
https://t.co/CzOjci9N2h

RT @SenateDems: "A fair chance in the race of life." That's how Abraham Lincoln described America's promise.
 
250 years after America’s bi…

https://t.co/sXuyFwuoUz

Congress passed a law to help lower housing costs. But Trump is holding it hostage. 

He doesn’t care about affordability. He wants unprecedented power over elections, even if it means disenfranchising millions of eligible American voters. https://t.co/6Cf0KKbNR4

https://t.co/uJB6NkOfJe

After the historic Blizzard of ‘26, the delegation & I helped make fed resources available for impacted RI businesses & nonprofits. In-person support from @SBAgov is available through this Friday & eligible RI entities can apply for low-interest loans into next year. Learn more:
Met with RI business & nonprofit leaders at @ProvChamber’s annual Congressional Breakfast to discuss how I’m fighting to lower costs and strengthen RI’s economy & workforce. https://t.co/lfeYLls0pI
50 years of Pride in RI! #Pride is both a celebration & an affirmation that #LoveisLove and everyone deserves the same freedoms & rights under the law. https://t.co/71NSWOQvqA

Newport Historical Society’s new Edward W. Kane & Martha J. Wallace Center for Black History elevates stories of enslaved & free Africans in Newport & their descendants. Proud to have delivered key federal support to make this important center a reality. https://t.co/yuoI0PWs7Y
Wishing all the dads & father-figures out there a very special Father’s Day! Thanks for all you do to raise us, teach us, & love us. Happy Father’s Day! https://t.co/JK3sx4T4WY

Let freedom ring! On this day in 1865, news reached enslaved people in Galveston, TX that freedom had finally arrived.
 
As we celebrate & reflect on #Juneteenth, we remember the challenges & responsibilities we all share in working toward a more perfect union for all Americans. https://t.co/IuyfyAXM1w

The coming weeks will determine whether this ceasefire holds & real negotiations follow. But Trump’s catastrophic war is not at all justified by this weak outcome.
 
I’m calling on Trump Admin to immediately come before Congress. Answers & accountability must come next.

Trump’s new agreement doesn’t stop Iran from enriching uranium or developing nuclear components. Instead, it freezes the status quo to wait for ‘future negotiations.’ 

Meanwhile, Trump has agreed to immediately lift sanctions on Iran. 

Frankly, this is just gross negligence.

After 100+ days of war, Trump secured little more than an agreement to start talking about Iran’s nuclear program. Trump chose war instead of diplomacy, forced Americans to pay for it, & in return got a ‘deal’ objectively far weaker than the JCPOA he walked away from 8 years ago.

While dining at Versailles, Pres. Trump signed an ‘agreement’ to end hostilities with Iran. Every American should be relieved this war is ending, but Trump deserves neither credit nor celebration for this outcome. 
 
Trump’s war was a catastrophic mistake.

GOOD NEWS: After @SenWhiteouse & I helped the Senate unanimously pass bipartisan Saving the OOI Act last night, the Trump Admin has reversed its plan to dismantle critical @NSF tool for researching ocean health. Big win for our fishermen, climate, coastal communities, & oceans. https://t.co/u7nwymtXZc

We can boost U.S. manufacturing, strengthen nat’l security, bring down costs, & create new jobs by modernizing & expanding @ExImBankUS’s mission.

Our Make More in America Act would help small & mid-sized U.S. manufacturers grow while shoring up domestic supply chains. https://t.co/Hh7ZTTY6A8

Celebrating our progress along the Woonasquatucket where federal investments & community collaboration came together for new & improved section of the Greenway on Kinsley & Promenade. Kudos to @WRWC for all their terrific work! https://t.co/MtHBUFuRoc

https://t.co/mhg2gmXOe8

Grateful for staff & volunteers of the American @LungAssociation of RI for all of their advocacy. Stopped in to thank them before their annual #LungForce Walk kicked off here at Roger Williams Park. Proud to support their critical work! https://t.co/T9u6Fuvpow
